Alias.name: yhelp
Alias.script: cecho("<cadet_blue>[YsoDevtools]<reset> yreset | ydry [on|off|toggle] | ylane <eq|bal> [on|off|toggle] | ylanes | ystage <eq|bal|free> <cmd> | ycommit [eq|bal] | yclear [lane] | ymode <paired|as_available> | yprefer <eq|bal> | ytest snap|sens|instill|bloodboil | yrdebug [on|off] <dam|focus> | yrshow [dam|focus] [full]\n")

Alias.name: ytest
Alias.script: local args = matches[2] or "" if Yso and Yso.devtools and Yso.devtools.test and type(Yso.devtools.test.run) == "function" then Yso.devtools.test.run(args) else print("[YsoDevtools] ytest harness not loaded.") end

Alias.name: yreset
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.reset)=="function" then Yso.devtools.reset() end

Alias.name: ydry
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.set_dry)=="function" then Yso.devtools.set_dry(matches[2] or "toggle") end

Alias.name: ylane
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.lane)=="function" then Yso.devtools.lane(matches[2], matches[3]) end

Alias.name: ylanes
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.status)=="function" then Yso.devtools.status() end

Alias.name: ystage
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.stage)=="function" then Yso.devtools.stage(matches[2], matches[3]) end

Alias.name: ycommit
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.commit)=="function" then Yso.devtools.commit(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: yclear
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.clear)=="function" then Yso.devtools.clear(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: ymode
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.set_mode)=="function" then Yso.devtools.set_mode(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: yprefer
Alias.script: if Yso and Yso.devtools and type(Yso.devtools.set_prefer)=="function" then Yso.devtools.set_prefer(matches[2]) end

Alias.name: yrdebug
Alias.script: local RD = Yso and Yso.devtools and Yso.devtools.route_debug if RD and type(RD.set)=="function" then RD.set(matches[3], matches[2]) end

Alias.name: yrshow
Alias.script: local RD = Yso and Yso.devtools and Yso.devtools.route_debug if RD and type(RD.show)=="function" then RD.show(matches[2], matches[3]) end

Script.name: YsoDevtools Core
Script.script: Yso = Yso or {} Yso.devtools = Yso.devtools or {} local D = Yso.devtools local function out(msg) if cecho then cecho("<cadet_blue>[YsoDevtools]<reset> "..tostring(msg).."\n") else print("[YsoDevtools] "..tostring(msg)) end end function D.reset() if Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.clear)=="function" then Yso.queue.clear() end out("reset") end function D.set_dry(tok) Yso.net=Yso.net or {}; Yso.net.cfg=Yso.net.cfg or {}; tok=tostring(tok or "toggle"):lower(); if tok=="toggle" or tok=="" then Yso.net.cfg.dry_run=not (Yso.net.cfg.dry_run==true) else Yso.net.cfg.dry_run=(tok=="on" or tok=="1" or tok=="true") end; out("dry="..tostring(Yso.net.cfg.dry_run)) end function D.lane(lane, tok) lane=tostring(lane or ""):lower(); if lane~="eq" and lane~="bal" then return false end; if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.set_ready)=="function" then Yso.state.set_ready(lane, tok~="down" and tok~="off" and tok~="0" and tok~="false", "devtools") end; out(lane.." lane updated") end function D.status() out("dry="..tostring(Yso.net and Yso.net.cfg and Yso.net.cfg.dry_run==true)) end function D.stage(lane, cmd) if Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.stage)=="function" then Yso.queue.stage(lane, cmd) end; out("staged "..tostring(lane)) end function D.commit(lane) if Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.commit)=="function" then Yso.queue.commit({ lane = lane }) end; out("commit") end function D.clear(lane) if Yso.queue and type(Yso.queue.clear)=="function" then Yso.queue.clear(lane) end; out("clear") end function D.set_mode(mode) if Yso.set_payload_mode then Yso.set_payload_mode(mode) end; out("mode="..tostring(mode)) end function D.set_prefer(lane) Yso.cfg=Yso.cfg or {}; Yso.cfg.prefer_lane=lane; out("prefer="..tostring(lane)) end D.test = D.test or {} function D.test.run(args) out("test "..tostring(args or "")) end D.route_debug = D.route_debug or {} function D.route_debug.set(which, on) out("route debug "..tostring(which).."="..tostring(on)) end function D.route_debug.show(which) out("route "..tostring(which or "all")) end
